info.name: Customer Management GraphQL API
info.description: Full collection of Customer Management GraphQL APIs with sample requests. Environment: http://localhost:7109/graphql. Updated: 2026-05-15 with Calendar/Scheduling and Analytics Dashboard APIs.

graphql.query:
query GetDashboardSummary($fromDate: DateTime!, $toDate: DateTime!) {
  dashboardSummary(fromDate: $fromDate, toDate: $toDate) {
    totalLeads
    totalCustomers
    activeDeals
    totalContacts
    totalRevenue
    conversionRate
    averageDealValue
    leadsCreatedThisMonth
    customersCreatedThisMonth
    dealsWonThisMonth
    dealsLostThisMonth
  }
}

query GetStaffPerformanceReport($idStaff: UUID!, $fromDate: DateTime!, $toDate: DateTime!) {
  staffPerformanceReport(idStaff: $idStaff, fromDate: $fromDate, toDate: $toDate) {
    idStaff
    staffName
    totalDealsCreated
    wonDeals
    lostDeals
    winRate
    totalRevenue
    averageDealValue
    contactsCreated
    leadsCreated
  }
}

query GetAuditLogs($entityType: String, $entityId: UUID, $fromDate: DateTime, $toDate: DateTime) {
  auditLogs(entityType: $entityType, entityId: $entityId, fromDate: $fromDate, toDate: $toDate) {
    idLog
    action
    entityType
    entityId
    oldValues
    newValues
    idStaff
    staffName
    ipAddress
    userAgent
    timestamp
    description
  }
}
